error_signature: messages are being sent out again
title: Postgres integration causes message sending issues
symptom: When the Postgres chat memory is used, messages are not sent to either the tenant or the team lead, leading to a silent failure.
not_this_if: Messages sent from team lead account
root_cause: The integration with Postgres may be causing the AI Agent to enter a loop or fail to process messages correctly, resulting in no messages being sent. This could be due to how the chat memory is being handled or conflicts with the AI model.
fix_steps: Remove the Postgres chat memory from the workflow.
Test the workflow to confirm that messages are sent correctly without Postgres.
Consider toggling between different AI models or service providers if issues persist.
agent_instruction: Remove the Postgres chat memory and test the workflow again.
